query: Could you pick a contact from my address book?
device_response: Alright, please choose a contact from your address book.

query: Please let me choose a phone number from a contact.
device_response: Sure thing—which contact’s phone number would you like to pick?

query: I would like to select an email address linked to one of my contacts.
device_response: Okay, please select an email address from one of your contacts.

query: Pick out a postal address from my contacts for me.
device_response: Got it—which contact’s postal address should I choose?

query: Can you help me pick someone in my contact list?
device_response: Certainly! Please pick someone from your contact list.

query: I need to grab a contact's email; can you show me the email options?
device_response: Understood—please choose the email address you’d like to grab.

query: Select a contact's phone detail.
device_response: Here are your contacts—which phone detail should I select?

query: Open contact at content://contacts/people/1001.
device_response: Alright, loading contact details for content://contacts/people/1001 now.

query: Could you please show me the details for the contact content://contacts/people/1002?
device_response: Got it! Displaying the contact at content://contacts/people/1002.

query: I want to see the information for content://contacts/people/1003.
device_response: Here are the details for content://contacts/people/1003.

query: Can you display contact content://contacts/people/1005?
device_response: Displaying the contact information for content://contacts/people/1005.

query: Pull up content://contacts/people/1006.
device_response: Pulling up the record for content://contacts/people/1006.

query: Please retrieve and display the details of the contact URI content://contacts/people/1007.
device_response: Retrieving and showing contact details for content://contacts/people/1007.

query: Show me the deets for content://contacts/people/1008.
device_response: Here’s the info for content://contacts/people/1008.

query: Please add a new contact named Alice Smith with phone number 555-1234.
device_response: Got it! Alice Smith has been added to your contacts. You can find it at content://contacts/people/alice_smith

query: I'd like to save Bob Johnson's contact with email bob@example.com.
device_response: Success! Bob Johnson’s info is saved. Contact URI: content://contacts/people/bob_johnson

query: Create contact for Charlie Brown with phone number 321-9876, email charlie.brown@example.com, and address 100 Peanuts Lane.
device_response: All set! Charlie Brown has been created in your address book. URI: content://contacts/people/charlie_brown

query: Insert a contact with name Diana Prince, phone: (212) 555-0198, email: diana@amazon.com, address: 123 Themyscira Ln.
device_response: Diana Prince has been saved successfully. Check it here: content://contacts/people/diana_prince

query: Add contact: name Edward Nygma, email enigramaster@riddles.com.
device_response: Edward Nygma is now in your contacts. URI: content://contacts/people/edward_nygma

query: New contact: Francisco III, address: 789 Elm St, Gotham City.
device_response: Done! Francisco III has been added. You can view it at content://contacts/people/francisco_iii

query: Please store contact info: Gina Torres, jobTitle: Actress, company: Firefly Productions.
device_response: Great! Gina Torres (Actress at Firefly Productions) has been stored. Contact URI: content://contacts/people/gina_torres

query: Can you retrieve the email address of the contact for this URI: content://contacts/people/23?
device_response: Sure thing! The email for that contact is sarah.jones@example.com.

query: I need the postal address for the client whose URI is content://com.company.contacts/contact/789.
device_response: Here’s the address you requested: 456 Market Street, Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94105.

query: Give me a summary of the contact at content://contacts/people/42.
device_response: Contact summary: John Doe – Phone: (123) 456-7890; Email: john.doe@domain.com; Address: 789 Elm Street, Springfield, IL 62704.

query: What's the phone number for the contact with URI content://contacts/people/1011?
device_response: Got it—this contact’s phone number is (987) 654-3210.

query: Fetch full details for this contact: content://com.app.addressbook/contacts/555
device_response: Full details retrieved: Emily Chen – Phone: (415) 222-3333; Email: e.chen@addressbookapp.com; Address: 1024 Pine Street, Apt. 5, Seattle, WA 98101.

query: I want to get the email from the contact at content://contacts/people/31415.
device_response: Absolutely—Leon's email address is leonard.hoffman@sample.org.

query: Provide a complete summary of contact content://contacts/people/1618.
device_response: Complete profile: Maria Gonzales – Phone: (321) 654-0987; Email: maria.gonzales@workmail.com; Address: 250 Oak Avenue, Denver, CO 80204.
